news_items.headline: Orioles place Bassitt on IL with back discomfort
news_items.summary: - The Baltimore Orioles placed right-hander Chris Bassitt on the 15-day injured list retroactive to Friday with low back discomfort and recalled Trey Gibson from Triple-A Norfolk to take Bassitt's place in the rotation Monday night against the Seattle...

news_items.headline: M's Crawford lands on IL with hand contusion
news_items.summary: The Seattle Mariners placed shortstop J.P. Crawford on the 10-day injured list with a right hand contusion and recalled infielder Ryan Bliss from Triple-A Tacoma before Monday night's series opener against the Baltimore Orioles.

news_items.headline: Angels' Mancini plays 1st game in majors since '23...
news_items.summary: Angels first baseman Trey Mancini, a cancer survivor and former Baltimore slugger, had three hits in his first major league game since 2023 on Monday night in a 5-4 loss to the Astros in 10 innings.

news_items.headline: Brewers, A's combine for 11 HRs, 34 hits in Vegas
news_items.summary: The Brewers outlasted the Athletics 15-14 in 12 innings Monday in Las Vegas, the fourth game in major league history with at least 29 runs and 11 homers.

news_items.headline: Kepler, still serving PED ban, signs with D-backs
news_items.summary: The Diamondbacks on Sunday signed OF Max Kepler, who is still serving an 80-game suspension for testing positive for a performance-enhancing drug.

news_items.headline: Tigers' Skubal goes 5 scoreless in 1st rehab start...
news_items.summary: Tigers ace Tarik Skubal pitched five scoreless innings in his first minor league rehabilitation appearance since undergoing elbow surgery last month.
